summary: SPEC-CONSISTENCY-001 is resolved at HEAD 42a6b66a627c7d3846cc1a33a390d2d09e926bf7. The Architecture now names origin/main 6222d118315e7001abcbdc786aca932e48c58232 and records the reviewed implementation HEAD ce89e4589ba8c96a418249cd2f9aa673acea646b as 85 violations with the same 65 undeclared / 9 budget / 11 orphan breakdown. Independent baseline and current artifacts agree exactly, while OCR-S-9, INV-OCR-7, Task 7, implementation ownership, and current-HEAD 124/124 targeted evidence remain aligned.

evidence: docs/architecture/story-vibepro-one-command-pr-ready-closure.md:143-149 now uses baseline 6222d118315e7001abcbdc786aca932e48c58232 and records 85 = 65 undeclared + 9 budget + 11 orphan for both baseline and reviewed implementation HEAD ce89e4589ba8c96a418249cd2f9aa673acea646b.
The two conformance artifacts have identical normalized summary objects.

The repair commit changes only the Architecture paragraph and the bounded review-budget record relative to ce89e4589ba8c96a418249cd2f9aa673acea646b; implementation, Story, Spec, test plan, unit test, and E2E test surfaces are unchanged.

OCR-S-9.evidence: The Story still requires selected-Story PR-route ownership without resolving an undeclared probe Story.

INV-OCR-7.evidence: The canonical Spec still links OCR-S-9 to the Architecture ownership section, managedWorktreeArtifactLocations, prRouteDirectoryIsStoryScoped, DRS-CONTRACT-009, scenario:OCR-S-9, and OCR-T-6.

Task_7.evidence: Task 7 continues to enumerate the exact Story, Architecture, Spec, test-plan, execution-state, unit-test, and E2E surfaces used by the repair.

implementation.evidence: The implementation remains unchanged from ce89e4589ba8c96a418249cd2f9aa673acea646b: execution-state consumes the existing artifact-routing owner's selected route template, removes synthetic probe-Story resolution, preserves story-scoped directory versus flat lifecycle-file behavior, and introduces no route-selection, rollback, CLI, or merge authority.

evidence: The TAP records scenario:OCR-S-9 as ok 64 and DRS-CONTRACT-009 schema 0.2 as ok 77.
The same run includes legacy flat-route, artifact-routing, rollback, and execute-merge command-flow regressions.
